interactions.summary: The host thanks Jiang and expresses hope that people can navigate the coming years safely and sanely.
Jiang closes by saying survival depends on will, on refusing powerlessness, and on orienting life toward wisdom and service rather than money.
The host thanks Jiang again and closes the interview.

claims.claim: Jiang says that making it through the coming age depends heavily on will and on rejecting the training that teaches people they are powerless.
Jiang says people oriented mainly toward money will not survive coming crises well, while people oriented toward wisdom, enlightenment, and helping others are better fitted for the age ahead.
Jiang says the coming age of darkness can become a time to shine for people whose purpose is learning, wisdom, and aiding others.

signature_moments.moment: Jiang flips apocalypse into vocation by telling listeners that the dark age belongs to those who seek wisdom and help others.
signature_moments.source_phrase: this coming age of darkness, it's for you ... to shine
signature_moments.why_it_matters: It gives the interview its final moral posture after hours of conspiracy, decline, and collapse.
